book: Il Veneto tra Giurassico e Cretaceo (ch.7; same book/series as it_geo_01..04)
validated_by: repo owner (segmentation + type + caption/figure grouping + reading order visually confirmed against the confirmation sheet 2026-07-03). Owner note: the F2 map bbox is slightly truncated at the TOP in the overlay — a capture/dewarp artifact of the non-flat sofa shot, not a GT error (bbox is overlay-only; grading ignores it).
bbox_note: Each block carries an approximate `bbox` [x,y,w,h] in Stage-02/03 dewarped HALF-page pixel coords, present ONLY for the validation overlay. Grading (tools/layout_order_eval.py) matches by anchor text / figure rank and IGNORES these bboxes.

grading.why: Stage 02 gutter-splits the spread into left.png (p.168) + right.png (p.169); Stage 04 orders each half independently.
grading.anchor_match: Match each GT anchor to a detected block by text overlap ANYWHERE in the block. OCR garbles this sofa-captured page.
grading.primary_invariants: (1) segmentation, (2) type, (3) caption<->figure grouping (C2->F2, C3->F3). Exact linear order SECONDARY.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C2
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 2 watercolor map + its caption. HARD: the caption sits in the lower-left of the map's bounding SQUARE (the map shape doesn't fill it), so it is INSIDE the figure bbox -> the detector SWALLOWS it into F2 (no caption block emitted). The embedded-caption failure mode.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C3
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 3 Ellipsactinia fossil photo + its 'Sopra' caption. Caption is in a separate gutter-side column, physically OUTSIDE the figure -> detected AND typed 'caption' correctly (contrast C2).

grading.known_detector_gap: On the current DocLayout-YOLO detector: (left) C2 is SWALLOWED into the F2 figure box -> no caption block, so C2 will be a segmentation MISS; (right) F3/C3/prose are detected + typed correctly. This fixture isolates the embedded-caption-inside-figure-bbox failure mode.

stripped.anchor: 7. Il Veneto tra Giurassico e Cretaceo - Parte seconda: il Bacino di Belluno e la Piattaforma Friulana

reading_order.desc: Fig. 2 hand-painted watercolor map of the Jurassic Italian peninsula. Fills most of the page. In-map hand labels (LINEAMENTO PERIADRIATICO, CANSIGLIO, BACINO DI BELLUNO, PIATTAFORMA DI TRENTO/FRIULANA/APULA, VENEZIA) stay INSIDE the figure. Caption C2 sits inside this bbox's lower-left.

reading_order.anchor: In questa pagina: Figura 2 La geografia nei dintorni della penisola italiana nel Giurassico inferiore
reading_order.desc: Caption for F2. Italic, LOWER-LEFT corner INSIDE the map's bounding box; ends 'Illustrazione di E.A. Manfre'. This is the embedded caption the detector swallows into F2.

stripped.anchor: 7. Il Veneto tra Giurassico e Cretaceo - Parte seconda: il Bacino di Belluno e la Piattaforma Friulana

reading_order.desc: Fig. 3 Ellipsactinia fossil photo (grey rock, top of subpage).

reading_order.anchor: Sopra: Figura 3 Fossile di Ellipsactinia, un idrozoo che colonizzava il margine della Piattaforma Friulana
reading_order.desc: Caption for F3. Separate gutter-side column, bottom-left; ends 'Foto di T. Abba'. Correctly separated (contrast C2).

reading_order.anchor: negli esemplari maggiori il diametro poteva raggiungere 30 cm e lo spessore del guscio 10 centimetri
reading_order.desc: Body prose, main single column. Continues into P2.

reading_order.anchor: Durante il Cretaceo la Piattaforma Friulana fu interessata da un'attivita tettonica piuttosto intensa
Erano i prodromi dell'annegamento. Nel Cretaceo superiore, infatti, intorno a 85 milioni di anni fa
reading_order.desc: Body prose, continues P2 (one flow, verified by text-join across the breaks).

document_order_gate4.note: Reflow target: Fig.2 floated with its caption C2, then Fig.3 with caption C3, then the continuous prose P1->P2->P3. NOTE the prose belongs to p.169's narrative; F2/C2 are the whole of p.168.

notes: EMBEDDED-CAPTION FIXTURE: the defining feature is C2, whose text sits in the lower-left of Fig.2's bounding box and is swallowed by the detector. Contrast C3 (separate gutter column, detected fine). Tests whether Stage-04 / Gate-4 can recover a caption embedded inside a figure's bbox.
GT COVERS segmentation + type + caption/figure grouping + per-subpage reading order ONLY. NOT verbatim text; no WER GT.
`bbox` fields are approximate, for the validation overlay only; grading ignores them (anchor/rank matching).
